messages.content:
Which term describes the traditional methodology of project management and software development?


annual cycle


waterfall


progressive flow


critical chain
Waterfall.

What is a core domain for Accenture’s Multi-party Systems practice?


social networking


employee retention


digital identity


marketing responsiveness
Digital Identity.

What is a core domain for Accenture’s Multi-party Systems practice?


social networking


employee retention


digital identity


marketing responsiveness
Digital Identity.

A software giant is enabling a city with smart parking, using real-time information captured by sensors on the vehicle and sensors in parking lots. When the vehicle leaves, data can be shared between the vehicle and parking system, which will prompt a payment from the driver’s payment device stored in their account.

How would the use of blockchain to store this data help reduce potential risks?


by creating a verified data record to a car’s digital identity


by sharing data with law enforcement authorities when requested


by easily monitoring traffic congestion in areas of the city


by storing large amounts of data without any delays

Using blockchain technology to store this data would help reduce potential risks by creating a verified data record to a car's digital identity. Because blockchain provides a secure, tamper-proof ledger of transactions that can be accessed and verified only by authorized parties with a transaction history, it can ensure the accuracy and integrity of the parking and payment data. This would prevent fraud and exploitation of parking management systems by unauthorized entities.

A company wishes to begin the process of implementing a Multi-party System and is looking for other companies with similar interests to join them. With blockchain, every organization sees the same data.

What does this provide?


ownership


intent


uniqueness


trust
Trust.

A Technology Architect at Accenture must present the value and strategy that Multi-party Systems bring to organizations.

Which statement will help the architect articulate the value of the Multi-party Systems practice?

Multi-party Systems enable organizations to securely share and exchange data with multiple parties in real-time, leveraging new value chains that improve operational efficiency and enhance customer experience.

A Technology Architect at Accenture must present the value and strategy that Multi-party Systems bring to organizations.

Which statement will help the architect articulate the value of the Multi-party Systems practice?


Multi-party Systems practice encourages many disparate single client implementations of blockchain.


Multi-party Systems practice helps keep value locked within organizations.


Multi-party Systems practice advises, implements and operates multiclient businesses and ecosystems.


Multi-party Systems practice enables the use of different versions of the same data across multiple organizations.

Multi-party Systems practice advises, implements and operates multiclient businesses and ecosystems, enabling organizations to securely share and exchange data with multiple parties in real-time, leveraging new value chains that improve operational efficiency and enhance customer experience.

What sets blockchain solutions apart from conventional record-keeping solutions?


the ability for multiple parties to be certain they are using the same data


a focus and priority on bitcoin and cryptocurrency


the ability to share different versions of the same data to multiple parties


a system that maintains rigor and complexity

The ability for multiple parties to be certain they are using the same data sets blockchain solutions apart from conventional record-keeping solutions. Blockchain provides a secure and transparent way for multiple parties to share and access the same data without the need for intermediaries or a central authority. This ensures the integrity and accuracy of the data across all parties involved, eliminating the risk of double-spending or fraudulent activities.

What is an advantage of using blockchain technology?


The system creates a hash or digital fingerprint for each participant in the blockchain.


The data and transactions recorded are decentralized and distributed among participants in the network.


All transactions are approved by a single and impartial third party or authority.


None of the participants are notified when changes are made to data stored in previous blocks.

The data and transactions recorded are decentralized and distributed among participants in the network is an advantage of using blockchain technology. By being decentralized, there is no central authority or intermediary that controls the data or transactions, which makes it difficult for any single entity or group to manipulate or corrupt the data. This also provides transparency and immutability of the data, and enhances security and trust since the data is validated and verified by the network of participants rather than relying on a single third party.

What is Accenture's role in Multi-party Systems?


helping ecosystems reimagine their processes to unlock value


helping a single company develop a data ingress platform


consulting on new technologies for investment purposes


developing a messaging solution between two companies

Accenture's role in Multi-party Systems is helping ecosystems reimagine their processes to unlock value. Accenture advises, implements, and operates multiclient businesses and ecosystems by leveraging blockchain technology to securely share and exchange data with multiple parties in real-time, enabling new value chains that improve operational efficiency and enhance customer experience.

A coffee producer wants to demonstrate that their products are produced using environmentally sustainable practices that respect the planet.

How does the implementation of blockchain technology help to achieve the client’s goal?


by providing traceability of products


by ensuring known-traveler digital identity


by providing anonymity for each producer


by eliminating the need for smart contracts

The implementation of blockchain technology helps achieve the client's goal by providing traceability of products. With blockchain, the coffee producer can record every stage of the coffee production process (from planting and harvesting to processing and packaging) on an immutable and transparent digital ledger. All parties involved in the coffee supply chain can have access to this information in real-time, which ensures accountability and transparency, and can help consumers make informed decisions about whether or not the products are produced using sustainable practices that respect the planet.

Accenture is helping a retail company increase efficiency in the management of customer transactions, payment processing, and answering customer queries using Machine Learning. The client uses blockchain technology to share data with their wholesale suppliers, delivery service providers, and customer organizations.

How would the client benefit by using blockchain technology to train the Machine Learning model?


Blockchain will ensure that the model training occurs on more consistent and timely data.


Blockchain will ensure only admins can modify the data being sent to the Machine Learning model.


Blockchain will ensure the automated process can still be manipulated by a human.


Blockchain will ensure the automation process is faster than centralized databases.

The client would benefit by using blockchain technology to train the Machine Learning model because blockchain will ensure that the model training occurs on more consistent and timely data. Since blockchain enables secure and transparent sharing of data among the retail company, wholesale suppliers, delivery service providers, and customer organizations, it ensures that the Machine Learning model is trained on the most up-to-date and accurate data sets that reflect the latest customer transactions, payment processing, and customer queries. This can greatly improve the accuracy and quality of the Machine Learning model, which in turn will lead to more efficient management of customer transactions, payment processing, and customer queries.

Which model describes how data is written to a blockchain?


full read and write


append only


rewrite always


append never
Append only.

An e-commerce company is collaborating with artisans from all over the world to sell the artisans' products. Accenture is helping this client build a platform that will maintain the integrity of the artisans' credentials by creating digital identities for them. This creates a privacy-preserving link between the products and the artisan's unique identities.

How will these digital identities help these artisans?


by individually recognizing and rewarding them for using methods and materials that align with buyers’ values such as sustainability and labor practices


by connecting them with the customers, enhancing their marketing, and building their client base


by allowing them to interact with the e-commerce company and getting details of the buyer so they can target to a specific audience


by linking them with the banks to prove credit-worthiness and informing them of loan options

These digital identities will help these artisans by individually recognizing and rewarding them for using methods and materials that align with buyers’ values, such as sustainability and labor practices. By creating digital identities, the e-commerce company can verify the identities of the artisans and provide traceability information about their products, meeting customers' requirements for sustainability and ethical production. This will provide a competitive advantage to the artisans, enhancing their marketing, increasing their sales, and building a more loyal customer base. In addition, the technology can also be used to track the artisan's performance in terms of fulfilling orders and other operational processes, improving efficiency, and identifying areas of improvement.
